description_long: This is a metallic screwdriver with a cylindrical, straight handle finished in a brass or gold color. The handle features subtle ridges and a hexagonal section near the top, likely for improved grip or compatibility with a wrench. The shaft is metallic and tapers to a flat, chisel-like tip, indicating it is a flathead screwdriver. The overall construction appears robust, with a seamless transition between the handle and the shaft. The surface is smooth and reflective, suggesting a polished metal finish. There are no visible brand markings, wear, or damage on the tool.
description: A metallic, gold-colored flathead screwdriver with a smooth, cylindrical handle and a polished finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the gold handle and the flathead tip extending to the right.
description_view_1: End-on view of the handle, showing its circular cross-section and the tip pointing away.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again displaying the full handle and the flathead tip extending to the left.
description_view_3: End-on view of the tip, showing the narrow, flat blade and the handle's circular end.
